channel.title: Defense in Depth on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Defense in Depth on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001): OT Cybersecurity Architecture, Design, and Engineering
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "OT Architecture" , "Network Segmentation" , "Industrial DMZ" , "Zones and Conduits" , "Device Hardening" , "Defense in Depth" , "Operational Technology" , "SOT-001" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master OT cybersecurity architecture, design, and engineering for the CompTIA SecOT+ SOT-001 exam. Learn design principles, physical access controls, device hardening, network segmentation, the industrial DMZ, zones and conduits, data diodes, and identity management.

item.title: ISC2 CISSP: Security Architecture and Engineering
item.category: "ISC2 CISSP Course" , "Security Architecture" , "Security Engineering" , "Cryptography" , "Physical Security" , "ISC2 Certification" , "Information Security" , "Security Models" , "Zero Trust" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master Security Architecture and Engineering for the ISC2 CISSP exam. Learn secure design principles, security models, cryptographic solutions, cryptanalytic attacks, and physical security.
